forbidden_methods.exception_policy: Only allowed if explicitly authorized by a future stage, file-count/size threshold is bounded, timeout budget is declared, checkpoint receipt is written before and after, and failure cannot block smaller validation fallback.
forbidden_methods.observed_failure: unzip -tqq and jar xf full recursive extraction timed out/stalled during FL17-MERGE-5 validation; user had to stop turn.
replacement_methods: selective extraction/read of required boot-critical files
forbidden_methods.scope: MetaBlooms full OS export/recovery validation in ChatGPT-style sandbox

governance_rule: Learned validation failures must become durable method denylist or bounded-use constraints, not ad hoc memory.
